creator: ache@nagual.pp.ru
text:
On Tue, 20 Jan 1998, Satoshi Asami wrote:

> What would the semantics be?  Should I just add it to fetch's
> environment if this variable is defined, or should I add "-p" to
> FETCH_BEFORE_ARGS?

Any way from this two will be correct. Adding flags is more visible, I
think.

-- 
Andrey A. Chernov
<ache@nietzsche.net>
http://www.nagual.pp.ru/~ache/
